LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APR-23-2019 HEARING ON DEFENDANT WHISTLE LABS INC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE VERIFIED APPLICATION OF THOMAS R. DAVIES TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR DEFENDANT WHISTLE LABS, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND THE APPLICATION COMPLIES WITH CRC 9.40. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WHISTLE LABS INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: DEFENDANT WHISTLE LABS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION OF THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 430.41. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AS REQUIRED BY THE STATUTE. DEFENDANT HAS UNTIL JUNE 24, 2019 TO RESPOND TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT AFTER THE MEET AND CONFER EFFORTS. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2019 Set For Trial On Sep-21-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WHISTLE LABS INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION OF PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES.

Defendant Whistle Lab's demurrer to the sixth cause of action for intentional infliction of emotional distress is sustained. Worker's compensation exclusivity does not bar a claim for intentional infliction of emotional distress based upon discriminatory or retaliatory conduct because such conduct is outside the normal risk of the compensation bargain. (See Light v. Department of Parks & Recreation (2017) 14 Cal.App.5th 75, 101 ["unlawful discrimination and retaliation in violation of FEHA falls outside the compensation bargain and therefore claims of intentional infliction of emotional distress based on such discrimination and retaliation are not subject to workers' compensation exclusivity"]; Nazir v. United Airlines, Inc. (2009) 178 Cal.App.4th 243, 288; Fretland v. County of Humboldt (1999) 69 Cal.App.4th 1478, 1492.)

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2019 Continued To Sep-04-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WHISTLE LABS INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

Defendant Whistle Labs, Inc.'s demurrer to the sixth cause of action of the amended complaint is ordered OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with CCP 430.41. Plaintiff is ordered to meet and confer immediately as required by the statute. Defendant has until June 24, 2019 to respond to the amended complaint after the meet and confer efforts.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Katherine A. Miller, Esq., Larua B. Gallagher, Esq., of King Cheng Miller & Jin, LLP, 626-304-9001, Tomas R. Davies of Harmon & Davies, P.C. 717-291-2236, appearing for Defendant(s) Whistle Labs; (all counsel appearing by CourtCall)
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WHISTLE LABS INC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The verified application of Laura Bailey Gallagher to appear as counsel pro hac vice for Defendant Whistle Labs, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed, and the application complies with CRC 9.40.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
